'''鈭歬-n-ch-th''' ('''kakanchethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ecchymose|ecchymose]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-n-ch-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ecchymose|ecchymose]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-n-ch-th
|-
! Lemma
| kakanchethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
